title: OpenDelve Repo Config
description: Root configuration for an OpenDelve-managed repo. Lives at <repo>/opendelve.yaml.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump triggers a v0.2 migration command.

name.description: Project slug. Lowercase, hyphens only. Used in artifact filenames.

defaultBranch.description: Git branch where signed approvals are committed.

name.description: Pack identifier. Must match a pack bundled in the binary or installed via pack add.

version.description: Semantic version of the pack at install time.

evidenceMode.description: Where raw evidence files live. v1 supports 'local' only; encrypted-backend is v0.2.

approvalMode.description: How approvals are anchored. v1 supports 'git-bound' only; external-oidc is v0.2.

rawEvidenceInPacket.description: If true, raw evidence files embed in packet PDFs/zips. NEVER true by default — see PHI policy.
